query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='items' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%pin%' OR (TABLE_NAME='items' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%plano%')
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3B47TRBhQthMPN1.da4a966d722d --database LjHhpq7m8HsaWSJ2BF6kdt --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, DATA_TYPE FROM information_schema.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME='items' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%pin%' OR (TABLE_NAME='items' AND COLUMN_NAME LIKE '%plano%')
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	DATA_TYPE
pinPlanoId	int
pinPosX	varchar
pinPosY	varchar
